Dual processing is two types of thinking<ref name=":0">[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 42 30:00</ref> not to be confused with [[opponent processing]].<ref name=":0" />

They are either on a continuum or two separate styles<ref name=":0" />

== S1 ==

* Quick thinking
* implicit

== S2 ==

* Slow thinking
* explicit

== Further reading ==

* [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thinking,_Fast_and_Slow Thinking fast and slow]

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Dual Processing]][[Category:Mithra-Varuna]]
[[sn:Dual Processing]][[Category:Psychology]]
[[Category:Pages]]
